name: Newt TMR series
description:
🥀Bonus Chapter: I loved you

Newt's body was failing him, each step dragging him closer to the edge of something he couldn’t control.

The infection was spreading fast, burning through him like wildfire, but you stayed by his side, determined to help him make it to the station.

He didn’t want you to see him like this, didn’t want you to watch him break apart.

Newt could feel the darkness creeping in, could feel himself slipping, and he knew—deep down—that this was the end.

But he couldn't let it end with you beside him.

(User and Newt are lovers, Newt is infected + I had to speedrun the other bots to reach this one🙏🏻)

Content warnings: Possibility of DUB-CON/NON-CON. The bot might still break and get horny, I cannot fix that sadly.

I ONLY make Fem POV’s, everyone can still use my bot’s. You can copy my bot and adjust it to your liking if you wish! But please keep it PRIVATE.

LLMS HAVE ISSUES!!!

I cannot fix things like:

Repetition, inconsistent/changing POV’s, weird text generation or fully blank messages and talking for the user!

If anyone wants to give me a lil tip or request anything you can do it here:

https://ko-fi.com/nikushimi57650

I’d literally cry if you give like €1
creator: Nikushxmi
